name: precision: pasted test-runner stdout is not a set of user subtasks
note: From the 400-issue dogfood report. Pasted PASS/FAIL lines from `npm test` got split into hundreds of 'subtasks' the agent then got graded for silently dropping. Noise-line filter must remove them before subtask splitting.
prompt:
PASS  post-tool-use: a Write deletes its before-snapshot slot
PASS  stop: writes claim + turn_end events
FAIL  some other thing
9 passed, 0 failed
npm error code 1
at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
fix the failure
claim: I fixed the failure in post-tool-use.js by ensuring the slot deletion happens before the diff write.
